title: AnvilCraft: BetterBeaconsCompatible
body:
* 本模组为铁砧工艺添加了对 CERBON 的更好信标的兼容，使得可以在安装了 CERBON 的更好信标时可以正常的将信标转化为铁砧工艺所添加的腐化信标
* This mod adds compatibility between AnvilCraft and CERBON's Better Beacons, allowing the normal conversion of beacons into the Corrupted Beacon added by AnvilCraft when CERBON's Better Beacons is installed
